This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Property shape-outside value 'rect(0px 3em 2% 1px)'
  assert_true: 'rect(0px 3em 2% 1px)' is a supported value for shape-outside. expected true got false
[FAIL] Property shape-outside value 'rect(0px calc(100% - 20px) 2% 3em)'
  assert_true: 'rect(0px calc(100% - 20px) 2% 3em)' is a supported value for shape-outside. expected true got false
[FAIL] Property shape-outside value 'rect(10px 20px 30px 25px round 20% / 0px 1px 2% 3em)'
  assert_true: 'rect(10px 20px 30px 25px round 20% / 0px 1px 2% 3em)' is a supported value for shape-outside. expected true got false
Harness: the test ran to completion.
